tools.name: japan_regional_food
tools.description: Japanese regional specialty dishes (sushi, ramen, wagyu, curry, gyoza...) with origin and description. Optional keyword filter.

tools.name: japan_onsen_guide
tools.description: Famous Japanese hot spring (onsen) towns with water type, features, access.

tools.name: japan_events
tools.description: Japanese festivals and annual events by month (1-12).

tools.name: japan_rail_lines
tools.description: Major Japanese railway lines and key stations.

tools.name: anime_pilgrimage
tools.description: Real-world locations featured in popular anime (seichi junrei).

tools.name: world_city_guide
tools.description: Travel guide for world major cities: attractions, food, transit.

tools.name: jp_data_api_catalog
tools.description: List all 29 paid pay-per-call endpoints of JP Data API (x402/USDC): filings, FX, weather, anime, sports, prediction markets and more.

tools.name: jp_translate
tools.description: Japanese-English translation (both directions), natural context-aware output. PAID TOOL: costs $0.02 USDC per call via x402.

tools.name: jp_summarize
tools.description: Summarize any text into a concise English brief. PAID TOOL: costs $0.02 USDC per call via x402.

tools.name: jp_company_brief
tools.description: AI company research brief from official registries (Japan EDINET, Korea DART, UK Companies House). PAID TOOL: costs $0.25 USDC per call via x402.

tools.name: jp_filings_list
tools.description: Daily Japanese corporate disclosures from EDINET (Japan FSA). PAID TOOL: costs $0.01 USDC per call via x402.

tools.name: jp_memory_set
tools.description: Store a value in persistent agent memory that survives across sessions. PAID TOOL: costs $0.002 USDC per call via x402.

tools.name: jp_memory_get
tools.description: Retrieve a value from persistent agent memory. PAID TOOL: costs $0.001 USDC per call via x402.
